title: Front-half conveyor wired (priced writer + Gate 1 edge) + capped H2 lift
summary: Resolved the priced=0 defect: added the missing `priced` writer (lib/pipeline-state/price-transition.ts, routed through the sole-writer engine, fail-closed), fixed Gate 1's declared edge from the illegal verified->outreach_ready skip to priced->outreach_ready, added the hop-7 operator hand-off (pre-contract-handoff.ts), and built the capped H2 lift (lib/outreach/send-cap.ts, fail-closed, left OFF). Proven by a synthetic Detroit lead traversing verified->priced->outreach_ready->gate->operator.
